query:
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS siteSettings;

CREATE TABLE siteSettings (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  settingKey VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  settingValue TEXT,
  imageUrl TEXT,
  imageKey VARCHAR(255),
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_settingKey (settingKey)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user NFLXR4X1BqV2Dun.root --database JqENYrGJnDCst7Pbb5cfUV --execute DROP TABLE IF EXISTS siteSettings;

CREATE TABLE siteSettings (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  settingKey VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  settingValue TEXT,
  imageUrl TEXT,
  imageKey VARCHAR(255),
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_settingKey (settingKey)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
